examples: I was a very moralistic kid, a vegetarian for animal rights reasons in seventh grade.
Usury laws were upheld on traditional moralistic grounds of alleged "sterility" of money.
Her discomfort with the moralistic rationales for sending troops into Kosovo was reflected in Governor Bush's waffly initial statements.
This combination of compassionate liberalism and moralistic conservatism means that Latinos are natural allies neither of whites nor of blacks.
